use_codes.desc: USE OF NALOXONE FOR THE EMERGENCY TREATMENT OF KNOWN OR SUSPECTED OPIOID OVERDOSE, AS MANIFESTED BY RESPIRATORY AND/OR CENTRAL NERVOUS SYSTEM DEPRESSION, FOR ADULT AND PEDIATRIC PATIENTS

indications.text:
KLOXXADO is indicated for the emergency treatment of known or suspected opioid overdose, as manifested by
respiratory and/or central nervous system depression, for adult and pediatric patients.
KLOXXADO is intended for immediate administration as emergency therapy in settings where opioids may be
